title: panicum loreum var. lanatum
intro: Panicum loreum var. lanatum, also known as Switch Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its slender stems and feathery foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Panicum loreum var. lanatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
